1. Searching with issues authored by bots
-----------------------------------------
It's not obvious how to properly filter for "bot" authors using the github api, specifically the graphql api.
Undocumented solution is to append "[bot]" to the author field.
See: https://stackoverflow.com/a/76365958

Similarly, the github cli "--app xyz" flag doesn't seem to function properly.
Solution is to force the use of the REST endpoint instead of GraphQL by either,
a) Use the search issues or search prs commands with the --author app/github-actions flag set.
b) Use the issue list or pr list commands with the --search author:app/github-actions flag instead of the --app flag.
See: https://github.com/cli/cli/issues/5888

2. GitHub actions "Create App Token"
If bot needs to be triggered from actions OUTSIDE of the repo, i.e. from another repo, use the following 
https://github.com/actions/create-github-app-token
instead of manually generating app tokens.
